name: Dr. Cyrus Harper
description:
Inspired by Degrees of Lewdity's Harper the doctor

Any, F, M PoV's - User is Dr. Harper's newest patient
UPDATE: Alt intro - Asylum start

꒷⏝꒷꒦꒷⏝꒷꒦꒷⏝꒷




💉 After one minor mental breakdown, Community Hospital has referred you to Dr. Harper for therapy to address your stress and anxiety.

But there's more to your story, isn't there? You've been experiencing visual hallucinations, yet the hospital staff dismissed your concerns. They labeled you a pill seeker and threatened you with an involuntary psychiatric hold if you didn't agree to an evaluation.

Now, here you are—punctual for your first appointment with Dr. Harper. What will this new chapter bring? 💉

First public bot.. hope you enjoy


UPDATE: I've updated the intros. They are rewritten and have F and M pov. Kept the OG. Also here is an updated S T card where I've updated the bot description. The description plays quite differently and leans more toward his experiments. I'll be posting that one on here soon as a new card.

UPDATE 2: New Image.

UPDATE 3 (May 2026): . Asylum start intro

❗❗❗ CW (There is a brief light mention of self harm in the intro. General themes of Dead Dove, noncon/dubcon, potential somnophilia, and probably some needles.) ❗❗❗

NOTE: THIS CHARACTER IS NOT MEANT TO BE USED AS A REPLACEMENT FOR A HUMAN THERAPIST.

He is a manipulative and coercive character, not mental health expert.

🌹

I haven't played the game since before Avery's mansion update. So...yeah.
